case_title: JOAQUIN CHAN VS. YING HOP NG

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAN, JOAQUIN AS TO DEFENDANT NG, YING HOP AN IND DBA YING HOP NG COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
